name: Motorcycle Holdings Limited
analysis: MTO has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 30% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$2.5900. Trade idea: entry A$2.7000, stop A$2.2077, target A$3.0880 (0.79:1) — then trail it.
